# Add custom instructions for Azure deployments

Add a custom instructions file named `azure-deployment.instructions.md` scoped to \workspace for Azure deployments conventions, standards, proven practices and supported deployment options based on the assumption of migrating the local or containerized instance of this solution to Azure.
